description_long: This is a modern, armless recliner chair with a sleek, minimalist design, reminiscent of the iconic Barcelona chair. The seat and backrest are upholstered in black leather or faux leather, featuring a grid of deep, square tufted buttons that create a plush, quilted appearance. The frame is constructed from polished metal, likely stainless steel or chrome, with a distinctive curved X-shaped base that provides both support and visual elegance. The backrest and seat are thickly padded, offering comfort, while the open sides and absence of armrests contribute to its contemporary aesthetic. The rear view reveals a series of horizontal support straps, likely for added structural integrity and comfort. This chair is suitable for upscale urban environments such as lobbies, lounges, or modern public spaces.
description: A modern, armless black recliner with tufted leather upholstery and a polished metal X-frame base, exuding a sleek and contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square tufted black leather upholstery and the wide, armless seat.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the reclined angle, thick padding, and the elegant curved metal X-frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the horizontal support straps and the back of the metal frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the reclined profile and the continuous seat-to-backrest transition.
attribute_armrest_design: No armrests are present; the sides are open, emphasizing a minimalist and modern look with no padding or structural extensions.
attribute_backrest_segmentation: The backrest is a single continuous piece, visually segmented by a grid of deep tufted buttons but lacking distinct headrest or lumbar sections.
